title: BGI Data Extractor
description: This is an Unofficial mod for Blockgame that allows you to copy an item's parsed BGI Data to your clipboard.
body:
This is an Unofficial mod for Blockgame that allows you to copy an item's parsed BGI Data to your clipboard.
 
This is designed to reference your Main Hand's held item when you press Left Ctrl + Left Shift + Right Click.

This mod uses BGI Parser by Bjnc, more information about such can be found [here](https://github.com/blackjack26/bglib/tree/master)

This mod's icon is an adaptation of PirateSoftware's "BlockGame" Logo, and falls under the [Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/) license. The original icon can be found [here](https://blockgame.piratesoftware.wiki/w/resources/assets/logos/blockgame/logo.png)
